title: bee-orchestrating SKILL.md: the dispatch role, with a dry-run contract
action: Author the skill a cold agent reads at the start of every iteration. It must be self-sufficient: the agent remembers nothing between iterations, so every fact it needs is either in this file or read live. Dispatch role: count occupied slots from herdr pane list plus bee state, never from agent_status (D18, D20); compute the dispatchable set per D1 (in-flight row + a CONTEXT.md whose Backlog line names that PBI + no worktree grant + zero cells), building the PBI-to-slug map as a reverse index over docs/history/*/CONTEXT.md; refuse to act at all when gate_bypass is below full, and skip any PBI classified high-risk or unclassifiable (D6, fail closed); rank the remainder by impact and announce the choice and its reason into the chat pane before acting (D16); then bee worktree new, herdr pane split --cwd, start the working agent (D14). First act of every iteration is self-naming per D17. Define a --dry-run contract the runner can pass through: report the full decision and change nothing - no worktree, no pane, no file. Match the structure and voice of the existing bee skills. Write byte-identical copies into both managed skill roots.

truths: The skill cites D1, D6, D14, D16, D17, D18 and D20 by id
Occupancy is derived from bee state, never from herdr agent_status
A PBI whose lane cannot be classified is skipped, not dispatched
The agent refuses to dispatch when gate_bypass is below full
--dry-run changes nothing on disk and creates no pane or worktree

artifacts.substantive: dispatch-role instructions readable cold, with a dry-run contract

prohibitions: Do not instruct the agent to read herdr agent_status as proof an item is finished (D20)
Do not introduce a state file or registry (D18)
Do not include merge or cleanup instructions; that is slice 2

verify: diff -q .claude/skills/bee-orchestrating/SKILL.md .agents/skills/bee-orchestrating/SKILL.md && for d in D1 D6 D14 D16 D17 D18 D20; do grep -qE "\b$d\b" .claude/skills/bee-orchestrating/SKILL.md || { echo "missing $d"; exit 1; }; done && ! grep -q 'agent_status' .claude/skills/bee-orchestrating/SKILL.md || grep -q 'never.*agent_status\|agent_status.*never' .claude/skills/bee-orchestrating/SKILL.md && echo SKILL_OK
